mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM enterprise
AND name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO enterprise(name, founding_date, industry_id, valuation, status, description) VALUES(#{name}, #{foundingDate}, #{industryId}, #{valuation}, #{status}, #{description})

INSERT INTO enterprise(name, founding_date, industry_id, valuation, status, description) VALUES
(#{e.name}, #{e.foundingDate}, #{e.industryId}, #{e.valuation}, #{e.status}, #{e.description})
